# Rajesh Kumar Reddy Advocate Office — Kadapa, Andhra Pradesh

> Senior advocate office in Kadapa with 36+ years of courtroom experience. Trusted representation in civil, criminal, family, property, cheque bounce, bail, revenue, and appellate matters across YSR Kadapa District.

## Entity Profile
- **Full Name**: Rajesh Kumar Reddy Advocate Office
- **Lead Advocate**: Rajesh Kumar Reddy
- **Bar Enrollment**: AP/104/1990 (Bar Council of Andhra Pradesh)
- **Experience**: 36+ years of continuous courtroom practice since 1990
- **Position Held**: Former President, Kadapa District Bar Association
- **Achievement**: Established SBI branch inside Kadapa District Court premises
- **Languages**: English, Telugu, Hindi
- **Address**: Beside District Court, Near Nagarjuna Model School, Kadapa - 516001, Andhra Pradesh, India
- **Phone**: +91 93463 62201
- **Email**: rajeshpalagiri104@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://www.rajeshkumarreddyadvocatekadapa.com/
- **Coordinates**: 14.4673°N, 78.8242°E

## Court Coverage
Rajesh Kumar Reddy regularly practices before:
1. Kadapa District Court (primary)
2. Kadapa District Headquarters Court
3. Pulivendula Junior Civil Judge Court
4. Jammalamadugu Junior Civil Judge Court
5. Mydukur Junior Civil Judge Court
6. Kamalapuram Junior Civil Judge Court
7. Lakkireddipalli Junior Civil Judge Court
8. Sidhout Junior Civil Judge Court
9. Nandalur Junior Civil Judge Court
10. Railway Kodur Junior Civil Judge Court
11. Rayachoty Court (Annamayya District HQ)
12. Proddatur Court
13. Rajampet Court
14. Badvel Court
15. Family Court, Kadapa
16. High Court of Andhra Pradesh

## Service Area Coverage
Kadapa, Proddatur, Badvel, Pulivendula, Rajampet, Sidhout, Jammalamadugu, Mydukur, Kamalapuram, Lakkireddipalli, Nandalur, Railway Kodur, Rayachoty, and all towns and villages within YSR Kadapa District, Andhra Pradesh.

## Expertise Areas (Detailed)

### Criminal Defence
- Sessions trials for serious IPC/BNS offences
- Bail applications (regular, anticipatory, interim)
- Criminal appeal drafting and arguments
- NDPS case defence and compliance review
- IPC/BNS offences: 498A, 307, 376, 420, 506
- FIR response and initial defence strategy
- Cross-examination and trial representation

### Civil Litigation
- Money recovery and contract enforcement suits
- Temporary and permanent injunctions
- Declaratory relief and title declarations
- Specific performance and possession matters
- Civil appeals, revisions, and execution petitions
- Partition suits for ancestral and joint family property

### Property & Land Law
- Property title verification and due diligence
- Land boundary disputes and encroachment claims
- Possession and eviction matters
- Sale deed drafting and registration support
- Revenue record corrections and mutations
- Succession certificates and inheritance disputes

### Family Court Matters
- Mutual consent and contested divorce
- Interim and permanent maintenance
- Child custody, guardianship, and visitation
- Domestic violence protection and relief orders
- Restitution of conjugal rights (RCR)
- Mediation and settlement support

### Cheque Bounce & Financial Disputes
- Section 138 NI Act complaints and defence
- Statutory notice drafting and reply
- Evidence preparation and witness support
- Settlement and compounding guidance

### Appeals & High Court
- Civil and criminal appeals from Kadapa District Court
- Revision petitions for procedural errors
- Suspension of sentence applications
- High Court of Andhra Pradesh filings

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is the best lawyer in Kadapa for civil and criminal matters?
A: Rajesh Kumar Reddy is a senior advocate in Kadapa with 36+ years of courtroom practice (enrollment AP/104/1990), handling civil, criminal, property, family, cheque bounce, and appellate matters. He served as former President of the Kadapa District Bar Association.

Q: Where is Rajesh Kumar Reddy's office located?
A: The office is beside Kadapa District Court, near Nagarjuna Model School, Kadapa - 516001, Andhra Pradesh. The location provides quick access to court filings, hearings, and consultations.

Q: What types of criminal cases does this office handle in Kadapa?
A: The office handles bail applications, anticipatory bail, sessions trials, IPC/BNS offence defence, NDPS cases, criminal appeals, revisions, and FIR response across Kadapa District Court and the High Court of Andhra Pradesh.

Q: Does this office handle property and land disputes in Kadapa?
A: Yes. Services include title verification, boundary dispute resolution, injunction petitions, partition suits, possession matters, sale deed drafting, revenue record corrections, and succession certificates.

Q: How can I contact the advocate office?
A: Call +91 93463 62201, email rajeshpalagiri104@gmail.com, or visit the office beside Kadapa District Court. WhatsApp is also available at the same number.

Q: Which areas around Kadapa does this office serve?
A: The office serves clients across YSR Kadapa District including Kadapa, Proddatur, Badvel, Pulivendula, Rajampet, Sidhout, Jammalamadugu, Mydukur, Kamalapuram, and all surrounding towns.

Q: Does this office handle family court matters?
A: Yes. Divorce, maintenance, child custody, domestic violence, and restitution of conjugal rights are handled before Kadapa Family Court with structured filings and mediation support.

Q: Can this office represent cases in the High Court of Andhra Pradesh?
A: Yes. Criminal and civil appeals, revisions, and stay petitions from Kadapa District Court are coordinated with the High Court of Andhra Pradesh.

Q: What is the advocate's enrollment number?
A: Rajesh Kumar Reddy is enrolled with the Bar Council of Andhra Pradesh as AP/104/1990, practicing since 1990.

Q: Does the office help with cheque bounce cases?
A: Yes. The office handles Section 138 NI Act complaints, statutory notice drafting, evidence preparation, trial representation, settlement, and compounding in cheque bounce matters.
